name: place_object
description: Move one hand TCP to a placement pose above a target place zone with optional explicit end-effector orientation.

parameters.place_x/place_y/place_z: Target placement zone center in MuJoCo world coordinates.
parameters.place_offset_x/place_offset_y/place_offs: Required TCP offset from the place zone.
parameters.target_quat_wxyz: Optional explicit TCP target orientation as quaternion [w, x, y, z]. Overrides lock_orientation/current orientation.
parameters.lock_orientation: If true and no explicit orientation is provided, preserve current TCP orientation during the move.
parameters.orientation_weight: Pose IK orientation weight when target orientation is used.
